entries.title: Arcane Inkwell
entries.description: Transform markdown directories into documentation sites
entries.excerpt: $1 transforms markdown content into a documentation site with generated navigation, rich markdown components, and one-line theming. Quick Start Current Built-In Capabilities - Auto-generated navigation from folder structure. - Top/bottom navigation bar modes. - Footer previous/next navigation with global and per-page toggles. - Callout markdown + callout tag components. - Rich markdown components (cards, steps, fields, tree, colors, tabs, and more). - Syntax highlighting and code-copy buttons.

entries.title: Callout Blocks
entries.description: GitHub callout markdown and callout tag components
entries.excerpt: Arcane Inkwell supports two callout authoring styles: 1. GitHub-style callout markdown ( ). 2. Rich markdown callout tags ( , , etc.). entries.title: Code Blocks
entries.description: Syntax highlighting for multiple languages
entries.excerpt: Code blocks are automatically syntax highlighted using Highlight.js. Hover over any code block to see the $1 in the top-right corner. [!TIP] Click the copy icon to copy code to your clipboard. The icon changes to a checkmark for 2 seconds to confirm. Dart JavaScript YAML Bash JSON Supported Languages - Dart - JavaScript / TypeScript - YAML - JSON - Bash / Shell - HTML - CSS - Markdown

entries.title: Navigation
entries.description: Sidebar, top/bottom nav bar, breadcrumbs, and page navigation
entries.excerpt: Arcane Inkwell navigation is generated from the content tree and section configs. Sidebar Navigation - Built from folders/files in . - Controlled with or . - Supports section collapse memory via localStorage. - Supports Lucide icon names, SVG URLs, and raw SVG markup in section/page icons. Top/Bottom Navigation Bar Global top bar behavior: Includes: - Brand/home link - Header links - Search (when enabled) - Theme toggle (when enabled) - GitHub link (when configured) Breadcrumbs Breadcrumbs are

entries.title: Rich Markdown Blocks
entries.description: Live showcase of all default rich markdown components
entries.excerpt: This page renders the default rich markdown component set that Arcane Inkwell registers automatically. Cards and Tiles Start by adding the package and running the app. Configure global behavior and layout flags. External links get a top-right external indicator. Internal tiles use the internal direction indicator. External tiles use the external-link indicator. Tile with no renders as static content. entries.title: Tags Metadata
entries.description: Organize pages with tags and enrich generated search index data
entries.excerpt: Tags are page metadata defined in frontmatter. Adding Tags Where Tags Are Used - Displayed in page metadata/footer chips by the default layout. - Included in generated search-index entries ( ). - Available to custom components/layout logic. Current Default Layout Behavior The default does not auto-render . If you want related-page cards, use explicitly in a custom layout composition. Best Practices 1. Use consistent lowercase tag naming. 2. Prefer specific tags ( ) over generic tags ( ). 3.

entries.title: Typography
entries.description: Headings, lists, and text formatting
entries.excerpt: Arcane Inkwell renders standard markdown with beautiful typography. Headings automatically appear in the Table of Contents on the right. Headings All headings from H2-H4 are tracked in the table of contents. Third Level (H3) Nested headings create hierarchy in your documentation. Fourth Level (H4) Even deeper nesting for detailed sections. Text Formatting Standard markdown formatting is supported: - $1 with - $1 with - with backticks - ~~Strikethrough~~ with Lists Unordered Lists - First item -

entries.title: Page Rating System
entries.description: Integrate thumbs up/down ratings with Firebase
entries.excerpt: The page rating system allows visitors to provide feedback on documentation pages with a simple thumbs up/down interface. Ratings are stored client-side and can be integrated with Firebase Firestore for persistence. Enabling Ratings Enable the rating widget in your : How It Works 1. A "Was this page helpful?" prompt appears at the bottom of each page 2. Users click thumbs up or thumbs down 3. Their choice is saved to localStorage to prevent duplicate votes 4. A custom JavaScript event is

entries.title: Search
entries.description: Runtime search behavior and generated search-index.json
entries.excerpt: Arcane Inkwell has two related search outputs: 1. Runtime UI search (client-side, instant). 2. Optional generated for external consumers. Runtime UI Search The built-in UI search is initialized from rendered sidebar links ( ). Current behavior: - Case-insensitive substring matching. - Minimum query length: . - Maximum shown results: . - Categories inferred from URL path segments. - Keyboard shortcuts: - focuses search. - closes results. - / navigates result list. - opens selected (or first)

entries.title: Section Configuration
entries.description: Configure folders with _section.json5 or _section.yaml
entries.excerpt: Section configuration files control how folders appear in the sidebar navigation. Place a or file in any content folder to customize its appearance. File Formats Arcane Inkwell supports two configuration formats: JSON5 (Recommended) JSON5 supports comments and trailing commas, making it ideal for configuration: YAML Standard YAML format: [!TIP] JSON5 is preferred because it supports comments, which are helpful for documenting configuration choices. Custom CSS Add custom styles via a file in your web directory: CSS Variables Both stylesheets expose CSS variables for customization: Colors Typography Spacing and Radius Dark Mode Classes Both themes add a class to the root element in dark mode: Theme Persistence Theme preference is stored in localStorage under the key . entries.title: Utilities
entries.description: Reference for sitemap, search-index, and changelog utilities
entries.excerpt: Arcane Inkwell exports utility classes that you can wire into your build or release workflow. SitemapGenerator builds XML from the current navigation manifest. SearchIndexGenerator creates style payloads from the manifest. Generated entries include: - - - - (when present) - - (when present) - (when present) ChangelogParser reads Keep a Changelog style markdown and returns structured versions.
